# JSONParser

> Parses, extracts, validates, and formats JSON data. Supports dot-notation path extraction (e.g., 'users.0.name').

| Property | Value |
|----------|-------|
| Version | 1.0 |
| Category | utility |
| Requires network | no |
| Requires credentials | no |
| Modifies state | no |
| Cacheable | auto |

## Parameters

These are sent by the LLM at runtime when it calls the tool.

| Name | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| data | string | yes | - | JSON string to operate on |
| operation | string | yes | - | Operation: parse | extract | validate | format |
| path | string | no | - | Dot-notation path for extract operation (e.g., 'users.0.name') |
| schema | object | no | - | Optional schema for validate operation (supports 'required' key list) |

## YAML Config

Optional overrides passed via the agent YAML config block.

*No config options.*

## Usage

### Simple (no config)

```yaml
agent:
  tools:
    - "JSONParser"
```

## Result Schema

Returns unstructured text.
